payload.answer: Recorded that the sender (sam@example.com) confirmed joining Point72 last month. The email also requests sending an 'AI infra' article, which should be handled as a follow-up action rather than stored as a durable fact.
payload.decision: create a follow-up action and store minimal durable facts about the sender’s affiliation confirmation; do not store exact dates

entity_resolution.reason: Sender email provided (sam@example.com) but no existing entity ID was given for resolution.

payload.intent: process email follow-up requesting delivery of an AI infrastructure article

details: Extracted sender affiliation confirmation (Point72) with relative time ('last month').
Identified delivery request ('Please send the AI infra article') as an action item.

repair_options: Ask Sam for the exact article title/link or confirm which 'AI infra article' he means.
